items.title_en: The 'dumb machine' promising a clean energy breakthrough
items.title_zh: “哑巴机器”有望实现清洁能源突破
items.desc_en: A stellarator is difficult to build, but could it be the best way to make fusion energy work?
items.desc_zh: 仿星器很难建造，但它是否是使聚变能发挥作用的最佳方式？

items.title_en: Apple names new chief executive to replace Tim Cook - BBC
items.title_zh: 苹果任命新首席执行官接替蒂姆·库克 - BBC
items.desc_en: Apple names new chief executive to replace Tim Cook  BBCTim Cook to become Apple Executive Chairman John Ternus to become Apple CEO  AppleApple's new CEO is no Steve Jobs. That might be an OK thing.
items.desc_zh: 苹果任命新首席执行官接替蒂姆·库克 BBCT蒂姆·库克出任苹果执行董事长 约翰·特努斯出任苹果首席执行官 苹果苹果的新任首席执行官不是史蒂夫·乔布斯。这可能是一件好事。

items.title_en: Labor Secretary Lori Chavez-DeRemer leaves Trump cabinet, Keith Sonderling takes over
items.title_zh: 劳工部长洛里·查韦斯-德雷默离开特朗普内阁，基思·桑德林接任
items.desc_en: Department of Labor Secretary Lori Chavez-DeRemer is resigning from the Trump administration, the White House said.
items.desc_zh: 白宫表示，劳工部部长洛里·查韦斯-德雷默将从特朗普政府辞职。

items.title_en: Alaska Air pulls 2026 profit forecast amid fuel costs related uncertainty
items.title_zh: 由于燃料成本相关的不确定性，阿拉斯加航空下调了 2026 年利润预测
items.desc_en: Alaska Air Group pulled its full-year profit forecast, as sky-high jet fuel costs driven by the Iran war cloud the outlook into the future.
items.desc_zh: 阿拉斯加航空集团下调了全年利润预期，因伊朗战争导致的高航空燃油成本给未来前景蒙上阴影。

items.title_en: Apple taps John Ternus as CEO to replace Tim Cook, who will become chairman
items.title_zh: 苹果任命约翰·特努斯 (John Ternus) 为首席执行官，接替蒂姆·库克 (Tim Cook)，后者将出任董事长
items.desc_en: Apple said on Monday that John Ternus is succeeding Tim Cook as CEO, with Cook assuming the role of executive chairman on Sept. 1.
items.desc_zh: 苹果公司周一表示，约翰·特努斯 (John Ternus) 将接替蒂姆·库克 (Tim Cook) 担任首席执行官，库克将于 9 月 1 日出任执行董事长。

items.title_en: Apple names new chief executive to replace Tim Cook
items.title_zh: 苹果任命新首席执行官接替蒂姆·库克
items.desc_en: John Ternus will take over running the technology giant as Cook steps up to become executive chairman.
items.desc_zh: 随着库克出任执行董事长，约翰·特努斯 (John Ternus) 将接管这家科技巨头的运营。

items.title_en: Amazon to invest up to another $25 billion in Anthropic as part of AI infrastructure deal
items.title_zh: 作为人工智能基础设施交易的一部分，亚马逊将向 Anthropic 追加投资 250 亿美元
items.desc_en: Amazon is boosting its investment in Anthropic, which is committing to spending over $100 billion on Amazon cloud services over the next decade.
items.desc_zh: 亚马逊正在加大对 Anthropic 的投资，Anthropic 承诺未来十年在亚马逊云服务上投入超过 1000 亿美元。

items.desc_en: Marvell saw a $2 billion investment from Nvidia in March, as AI demand continues to surge.
items.desc_zh: 随着人工智能需求持续激增，Marvell 在 3 月份获得了 Nvidia 20 亿美元的投资。

items.title_en: HSBC is ‘max bullish’ stocks, saying Iran conflict is not a game changer
items.title_zh: 汇丰银行“最大看涨”股票，称伊朗冲突不会改变游戏规则
items.desc_en: HSBC argued that the market rally to new heights over the past few days is very much in line with historical precedent.
items.desc_zh: 汇丰银行认为，过去几天市场反弹至新高非常符合历史先例。

items.title_zh: 我们对美国扣押的伊朗船只了解多少

items.title_zh: 蓝色起源火箭因卫星“事故”而停飞
items.desc_en: The firm founded by Amazon billionaire Jeff Bezos is investigating the failed launch.
items.desc_zh: 亚马逊亿万富翁杰夫·贝索斯创立的公司正在调查此次失败的发射。

items.desc_zh: 据称，亚马逊强迫主要供应商说服沃尔玛、塔吉特和家得宝等竞争对手提高价格

items.title_zh: 美国歌手 D4vd 因失踪少女死亡被控谋杀
items.desc_en: Prosecutors say he could face life in prison due to special circumstances surrounding the girl's disappearance and death.
items.desc_zh: 检察官表示，由于女孩失踪和死亡的特殊情况，他可能面临终身监禁。

items.title_en: Tariff refunds begin on Monday. These retailers are due big paydays
items.title_zh: 关税退款从周一开始。这些零售商将迎来丰厚的发薪日
items.desc_en: U.S. importers, such as Walmart and Target, could be in line for billions in tariff refunds as the government launches its claims-filing portal on Monday.
items.desc_zh: 随着政府周一推出索赔申请门户，沃尔玛和塔吉特等美国进口商可能会获得数十亿美元的关税退款。

items.title_en: Trailblazing black beauty queen who defied apartheid South Africa dies aged 76
items.title_zh: 南非反抗种族隔离制度的黑人选美皇后去世，享年 76 岁
items.desc_en: At the 1972 Miss World contest, Cynthia Shange was one of two contestants from South Africa - one black and one white.
items.desc_zh: 在 1972 年世界小姐比赛中，辛西娅·尚格 (Cynthia Shange) 是来自南非的两名参赛者之一（一黑人一白人）。

items.title_en: Police gunfight with favela gang traps 200 tourists on hilltop
items.title_zh: 警方与贫民窟团伙发生枪战，200名游客被困在山顶
items.desc_en: The access route to Morro Dois Irmãos was blocked during the operation in Vidigal, leaving scores of alarmed sightseers stuck on the hill.
items.desc_zh: 在维迪加尔的行动中，通往莫罗·多伊斯·伊尔芒斯 (Morro Dois Irmãos) 的通道被封锁，导致数十名惊慌失措的游客被困在山上。

items.title_en: Chair nominee Kevin Warsh says Fed must ‘stay in its lane’ to maintain independence
items.title_zh: 主席提名人凯文·沃什表示，美联储必须“坚持自己的路线”以保持独立性
items.desc_en: Warsh also expressed firm commitment to fighting inflation with only one mention of the labor market.
items.desc_zh: 沃什还表达了对抗通胀的坚定承诺，其中只提到了劳动力市场。

items.title_en: Kash Patel sues The Atlantic for $250 million over alcohol abuse claims
items.title_zh: 卡什·帕特尔 (Kash Patel) 因酗酒指控起诉《大西洋月刊》索赔 2.5 亿美元
items.desc_en: The Atlantic article said FBI Director Kash Patel "has alarmed colleagues with episodes of excessive drinking and unexplained absences."
items.desc_zh: 《大西洋月刊》的文章称，联邦调查局局长卡什·帕特尔“因酗酒和不明原因缺席的事件向同事发出警报”。

items.title_en: Trump threatens Iran again as ceasefire deadline looms, U.S. gears up for peace talks
items.title_zh: 随着停火期限临近，特朗普再次威胁伊朗，美国为和平谈判做好准备
items.desc_en: Trump reportedly said Sunday that if Iran doesn't sign a deal, "the whole country is going to get blown up," with its bridges and power plants being targeted.
items.desc_zh: 据报道，特朗普周日表示，如果伊朗不签署协议，“整个国家将被炸毁”，其桥梁和发电厂将成为目标。

items.title_en: More than 200 rescued from IS-linked group in DR Congo
items.title_zh: 刚果民主共和国有 200 多人从与 IS 相关的组织中获救
items.desc_en: The youngest of those freed from an Allied Democratic Forces camp is a girl aged just 14, Uganda's army says.
items.desc_zh: 乌干达军队称，从民主同盟军营地释放的最年轻的人是一名年仅 14 岁的女孩。

items.title_en: Strait of Hormuz ship traffic briefly rose and then slowed after weekend attacks
items.title_zh: 霍尔木兹海峡的船舶流量在周末袭击后短暂上升，然后放缓
items.desc_en: Commercial ships remain cautious about transiting the strait as tensions escalate between the U.S. and Iran again.
items.desc_zh: 随着美国和伊朗之间的紧张局势再次升级，商船对通过该海峡仍持谨慎态度。

items.title_en: Days of Our Lives and Starship Troopers actor Patrick Muldoon dies aged 57
items.title_zh: 《我们的日子》和《星河战队》演员帕特里克·马尔登去世，享年 57 岁
items.desc_en: The actor and producer also appeared in Melrose Place and Saved By the Bell.
items.desc_zh: 这位演员兼制片人还出现在《梅尔罗斯广场》和《救命钟》中。

items.title_en: Howard Marks says there are very few cheap stocks: 'Bargains come when people panic'
items.title_zh: 霍华德·马克斯表示，便宜的股票很少：“当人们恐慌时，便宜货就来了”
items.desc_en: "For the most part, this is not a market that's on sale," Marks said Monday.
items.desc_zh: “在很大程度上，这不是一个正在出售的市场，”马克斯周一表示。

items.title_zh: 凯文·沃什（Kevin Warsh）将成为第一位科技兄弟美联储主席。硅谷如何塑造了他

items.title_en: Investors are misreading news about the Iran war, analysts say as markets whipsaw
items.title_zh: 分析师表示，随着市场震荡，投资者误读了有关伊朗战争的消息
items.desc_en: Monday's declines put the brakes on another rapid recovery in global stock indices akin to last year's 'liberation day' bounce.
items.desc_zh: 周一的下跌阻碍了全球股指再次快速复苏，类似于去年的“解放日”反弹。

items.title_en: Japan on high alert for 'huge' second quake after issuing tsunami warning
items.title_zh: 日本发布海啸警报后对第二次“特大”地震保持高度警惕
items.desc_en: Japan's meteorological agency warns another, stronger earthquake may hit in the next week,
items.desc_zh: 日本气象厅警告称，下周可能会发生另一场更强的地震，

items.title_en: Elon Musk summoned by French prosecutors amid ongoing X probe
items.title_zh: 法国检察官在正在进行的 X 调查中传唤埃隆·马斯克
items.desc_en: Whether the tech billionaire will attend the interview requested by Paris prosecutors remains to be seen.
items.desc_zh: 这位科技亿万富翁是否会参加巴黎检察官要求的面谈还有待观察。

items.desc_zh: 沙米姆·马菲被指控代表伊朗促成向苏丹国防部出售武器。

items.desc_en: Distress call captures tanker under fire as Iran shuts Strait of Hormuz and more top headlines  Fox NewsDistress call captures tanker under fire, Iran shuts Hormuz trapping thousands of sailors  Fox N
items.desc_zh: 遇险呼叫捕获油轮遭到攻击，伊朗关闭霍尔木兹海峡和更多头条新闻 遇险呼叫捕获油轮遭受攻击，伊朗关闭霍尔木兹海峡，数千名水手被困 Fox N

items.title_en: Rebel Wilson's claims against actress are 'malicious concoctions', Australian court hears
items.title_zh: 澳大利亚法庭获悉，瑞贝尔·威尔逊对女演员的指控是“恶意混合物”
items.desc_en: Wilson has been accused of defaming the star of her film The Deb over an incident involving a bath in Bondi.
items.desc_zh: 威尔逊被指控因在邦迪洗澡的事件而诽谤她的电影《黛布》中的明星。

items.title_en: Voters say they feel confused and misled on Virginia's redistricting vote - NPR
items.title_zh: 选民表示，他们对弗吉尼亚州的选区重新划分投票感到困惑和误导 - NPR
items.desc_en: Voters say they feel confused and misled on Virginia's redistricting vote  NPRBig Names Wait in the Wings as Virginians Decide Their House Maps  The New York TimesPinwheels and the ‘lobster district’:
items.desc_zh: 选民们表示，他们对弗吉尼亚州的选区重新划分投票感到困惑和误导。当弗吉尼亚人决定他们的房屋地图时，NPR 的大人物们伺机而动。《纽约时报》风车和“龙虾区”：

items.title_en: New Zealand declares state of emergency in Wellington as floods hit
items.title_zh: 新西兰因洪水袭击惠灵顿宣布进入紧急状态
items.desc_en: Footage online shows vehicles submerged, trees uprooted and houses hit by landslides.
items.desc_zh: 网上的视频显示，车辆被淹没，树木被连根拔起，房屋被山体滑坡摧毁。

items.title_en: Oil prices rise after Trump says Iranian ship seized
items.title_zh: 特朗普称伊朗船只被扣押后油价上涨
items.desc_en: Energy markets have seen wild swings since the US and Israel attacked Iran on 28 February.
items.desc_zh: 自2月28日美国和以色列袭击伊朗以来，能源市场出现剧烈波动。

items.title_en: Rumen Radev looks set to win Bulgarian Parliamentary election
items.title_zh: 鲁门·拉德夫 (Rumen Radev) 有望赢得保加利亚议会选举
items.desc_en: Exit polls put his Progressive Bulgaria on 37%, more than double the score of the closest runner-up, but he will likely need to form a coalition to govern.
items.desc_zh: 出口民意调查显示，他的进步保加利亚支持率为 37%，是最接近的亚军得分的两倍多，但他可能需要组建一个联盟来执政。

items.desc_zh: 通过创客硬件将克劳德带入现实世界

items.title_en: Eight children killed in Louisiana shooting, police say
items.title_zh: 警方称路易斯安那州枪击事件中八名儿童丧生
items.desc_en: The children, aged from one to 14 years old, were killed in a shooting in Shreveport, Louisiana, which police are describing as a "domestic disturbance".
items.desc_zh: 这些儿童年龄从 1 岁到 14 岁不等，他们在路易斯安那州什里夫波特的一次枪击事件中丧生，警方将其描述为“家庭骚乱”。

items.title_en: White House and Anthropic set aside court fight to meet amid fears over Mythos model
items.title_zh: 由于对神话模型的担忧，白宫和 Anthropic 搁置了法庭诉讼以进行会面
items.desc_en: President Donald Trump previously railed against the company for rejecting broad government demands.
items.desc_zh: 唐纳德·特朗普总统此前曾批评该公司拒绝广泛的政府要求。

items.title_en: Tinder and Zoom offer 'proof of humanity' eye-scans to combat AI
items.title_zh: Tinder 和 Zoom 提供“人性证明”眼部扫描来对抗人工智能
items.desc_en: The tech aims to identify people's irises and stop the rise of fake accounts and malicious scams.
items.desc_zh: 该技术旨在识别人们的虹膜并阻止虚假账户和恶意诈骗的兴起。

items.title_en: What is Claude Mythos and what risks does it pose?
items.title_zh: 什么是克劳德神话？它会带来什么风险？
items.desc_en: The company's claim the AI tool can outperform humans at some hacking and cyber-security tasks has sparked fears in the financial world.
items.desc_zh: 该公司声称人工智能工具可以在某些黑客和网络安全任务上超越人类，这引发了金融界的担忧。

items.title_en: Could a digital twin make you into a 'superworker'?
items.title_zh: 数字孪生能让你成为“超级工人”吗？

items.desc_zh: 公司表示，数字孪生可以提高员工的工作效率，但它们是否是潜在的法律雷区？

items.desc_zh: Meta 和 YouTube 等公司的高管将被问到他们正在采取哪些措施来保护儿童。

items.title_en: Booking.com customers warned of 'reservation hijacking' after hack
items.title_zh: Booking.com 客户被黑客攻击后收到“预订劫持”警告
items.desc_en: The travel platform said it had changed Pins to protect customers but would not say how many were affected.
items.desc_zh: 该旅游平台表示，它已更改 Pin 图以保护客户，但未透露有多少人受到影响。

items.title_en: Google to punish sites that trap people in with back button tricks
items.title_zh: 谷歌将惩罚利用后退按钮欺骗用户的网站
items.desc_en: The tech giant said it will punish sites that block back button navigation from June.
items.desc_zh: 这家科技巨头表示，将从 6 月份开始惩罚屏蔽后退按钮导航的网站。

items.title_en: Man charged with attempted murder in attack on home of OpenAI's Sam Altman
items.title_zh: 一名男子被指控在袭击 OpenAI 萨姆·奥尔特曼 (Sam Altman) 家时企图谋杀
items.desc_en: The Texas man, who also faces federal felony charges, allegedly had documents advocating for violence against AI executives.
items.desc_zh: 这名德克萨斯州男子还面临联邦重罪指控，据称他持有鼓吹对人工智能高管实施暴力的文件。
